description: Search Creative Fabrica's 20-million-plus fonts, graphics, crafts, and POD designs from your terminal — with a local catalog database, file-format and commercial-license filters the web UI lacks, and designer tracking.

tools.name: products_search
tools.description: Low-level Algolia multi-query passthrough (prefer the top-level search/browse/free/pod commands). Optional: requests. Returns the new SearchResponse.
